title: Confirm acceptance criteria for 0.4.4
summary: Confirmed 0.4.4 acceptance criteria: verify/commit ordering enforced, start/update gating validated, rebuild no longer halts on bad ordering, and coverage/verification targets met (verify warns about missing targets).
acceptance_criteria: `commit_if_verified` succeeds after a valid verify lifecycle.
`ops_update_task` rejects mismatched `tx_id` and succeeds when aligned.
Transaction state rebuild completes without halting on invalid event ordering.
Test coverage >= 90% and verification suite passes.

steps.description: Review test results and coverage to confirm requirements are met.
Validate tool sequencing behavior matches the acceptance criteria.
Record confirmation and any remaining risks or follow-ups.

notes: Evidence: p2-t1 enforced verify.start ordering and commit gating; p3-t1 added tests for verify lifecycle.
Evidence: p2-t2 hardened start/update gating and tx_id mismatch handling; p3-t1 tests cover ops_start_task/ops_update_task behavior.
Evidence: p2-t3 rebuild ordering warnings prevent halting; p3-t1 tests cover rebuild guardrails.
Evidence: coverage.xml line-rate 0.9551 (p3-t2) and repo_verify OK with warning (p4-t1).
